name: U.S. Embassy
content:
The security staff is very friendly. At least the one guy I dealt with. While living in Ireland, I had to renew my American passport. The embassy lost my original appointment, and I had to go back a second time. The security guard somehow remembered me from my first appointment, nearly a month prior.
Pro tip: if you need your American passport renewed, it is significantly faster to do it at an American embassy abroad than it is to renew the passport from within the U.S. My sister renewed her passport (from within the U.S.) around the same time as me, and I got my passport back nearly two months earlier than hers.
